ksa_text: Knowledge of data platform architecture patterns including data warehouse, data lake, data lakehouse, data mesh, and data fabric architectures, and the trade-offs and selection criteria for each pattern.

Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DA-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4319, domain DA, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
